tasks.intent: computed from all non-deleted task entries — do not mutate directly

task-count.intent: live count of active (non-completed) tasks — display only

add-task.intent: appends to task list, clears ~new-task — no-op if ~new-task is empty

complete-task.intent: marks task completed — irreversible in this workbook version

clear-completed.intent: removes all completed tasks from the list — destructive, no undo

workbook-purpose.intent: personal task tracking workbook — single user, no collaboration, no persistence beyond session
